*355 brands total* (+0 today)
96.9% have complete profiles (description + image) — 11 brands have description but no hero image

:warning: *Possible Broken (4)*
• `BoingBoing` — <https://www.boing.com.tw|boing.com.tw> — all indexed URLs use HTTP only; HTTPS may not be served
• `Enjoy Caster` — <https://enjoycaster.com.tw|enjoycaster.com.tw> — real domain is `enjoycaster.com`; .com.tw has no indexed pages
• `FYE` — <https://foryourearth.com|foryourearth.com> — brand active on Pinkoi/social but all indexed URLs are HTTP; HTTPS unconfirmed
• `福灣巧克力` — <https://shop.fuwanchocolate.com|shop.fuwanchocolate.com> — shop migrated to `fuwanshop.com`; legacy domain serves partial blog content only

:eyes: *Suspicious — Third-party (3)*
• `1973 Furniture` — <https://1973home.myshopify.com|1973home.myshopify.com> — correct brand content but hosted on Shopify subdomain, not brand's own domain
• `S Pantyhose` — <https://majimeowcutiesportsday.com.tw|majimeowcutiesportsday.com.tw> — URL unrelated to brand name; likely a campaign/event site
• `我很醜可是我很 Natural+` — <https://uglybuthealthy.weebly.com|uglybuthealthy.weebly.com> — free Weebly subdomain; no custom domain

:question: *Unknown / Unverified (5)*
• `Journey of Sole` — <https://journeyofsole.com|journeyofsole.com> — zero indexed search results; domain unconfirmed
• `MONOCEAN` — <https://monocean.co|monocean.co> — no indexed content; .com version is parked/for sale
• `Re:Nrob Lab` — <https://shop.renroblab.com|shop.renroblab.com> — brand exists on Instagram but shop URL not indexed
• `Sammm._.Studio` — <https://sammm.store|sammm.store> — no indexed content found
• `YUMOR Original` — <https://yumor-original.framer.website|yumor-original.framer.website> — brand on Instagram (@yumor.original) but Framer subdomain not indexed

Connections: 1 active / 17 idle / 0 idle-in-txn — 20/60 total (33%) :white_check_mark:
Dead tuples: :warning: `brands` at 24.6% (102 dead / 414 live) — VACUUM recommended. Also: `brand_owners` 3300%, `brand_saves` 700%, `brand_submissions` 450%, `owner_email_preferences` 300%, `claim_requests` 150%, `newsletter_subscribers` 100%, `profiles` 25%
